name: Jess's Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix all.
Place in dish& sprinkle with paprika& parsley.
Bake@ 350 until heated through, about 15-20 minutes.
Serve with crackers of your choice.

name: Parmesan Croutons
directions: Toast french bread cubes in the oven at 400 degrees for 10 minutes.
In a saute pan, melt butter.
Add paprika, salt and toasted bread cubes and toss to coat.
Toss with Parmesan.

similar.name: Puff Pastry and Parmesan Cream Appetizers

name: Substitute for Sweetened Condensed Milk
directions: Stir together sugar and dry milk powder.
Stir melted margarine into the hot water.
Stir water mixture into the sugar mixture, in about three additions, stirring after each addition.
If you stir the water mixture in all at once it can be difficult to get all the lumps out.
Let stand about 10-15 minutes before using.
It will thicken.
Stir before using.

name: Nacho Cheese Dip
directions: In a medium sauce pan or in the microwave, melt the Velveeta cheese.
In a food processor, process the can of tomatoes with green chilies.
Stir the tomatoes into the cheese and heat till nice and warm.
Serve with the nacho chips.

name: Substitute Buttermilk
directions: Make milk from water and milk powders.
Add vinegar and let sit for 10 minutes.
Use as you would buttermilk.

name: No-yeast pizza base
directions: rub flour and margarine together to form "breadcrumbs"
beat the eggs then add a small amount of beaten egg to the mixture at a time. Mix well until it has bound together but isn't too sticky
turn out onto a floured surface and knead until fairly smooth
place on a greased baking tray and add the toppings.  place at the top of a preheated oven at 190 degrees Centigrade (gas mark 4) and cook for about 20-25 minutes.

name: The Blue Willow Inn's Vidalia Onion Dip
directions: Preheat the oven to 350 degrees In a large bowl mix all the ingredients and then pour into a baking dish.
Bake until bubbly, approximately twenty to twenty-five minutes Serve with crackers.

name: Skyline Chili Dip
directions: Spread cream cheese on bottom of casserole dish.
Sprinkle diced onions (optional).
Pour Skyline chili over onions (opt.) and cream cheese.
Cover with cheddar cheese.
Conventional oven: Heat at 350 degrees until cheese is bubbling but not brown, about 10 minutes.
Microwave oven: Heat on high for 2 minutes or until cheese is melted.
Serve warm with Corn chips or Fritos corn chips.

name: Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350F.
Using a food processor, pulse all ingredients together until smooth.
Turn into an approximately 4c oven-safe dish.
Bake 15-20 minutes or until it bubbles (it does not need to brown).
Serve warm or chilled with crostini, crackers or crudite.

name: Feta Tomato Topper
directions: In small bowl combine cheese, tomatoes, red onion, pepper and oregano.
Spoon 1 tablespoons of mixture onto each toast.

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Preheat oven 325°.
Mix all ingredients together (holding back 1/2 cup of parmesan cheese for the top).
Put in a large casserole dish.
Sprinkle the top with remaining parmesan cheese.
Bake 20 minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly.
Serve with chips and enjoy!

name: Basil Pita Chips
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix garlic and basil into the butter.
Separate tops from bottoms on pita bread.
Spread herb butter on pita halves.
Sprinkle with parmesan and parsley.
Cut into triangles.
Place on baking sheet butter side up.
Bake for 15 minutes.
Place on paper towels to cool.

name: Parmesan Noodles
directions: Pour noodles into a large serving dish and keep warm.  Melt butter in a small saucepan and saute onion until tender.  Add cream, Parmesan cheese, and garlic powder.  Stir until smooth.  Do not boil.
Pour sauce over noodles and gently mix.

name: Tortellini Salad
directions: Cook tortellini per package directions and rinse in cold water.
Drain off water.
Add remaining ingredients and mix well.
Best if made a few hours ahead.

similar.name: Out of This World Caesar Pasta Salad

name: Easy Alfredo Sauce With Pasta
directions: Start by melting butter and cream cheese. once beginning to melt add milk and Parmesan cheese.
Heat until melted together stirring often.
Add salt, pepper and garlic to taste.  Serve over pasta.

name: Dump Dip
directions: Fry bacon till crisp, Drain.
Crumble in large bowl. Add cheese and chopped onions.
Mix with mayonnaise until a consisteny to dip.
Use Wheat Thins to dip.

name: Awesome Hot Artichoke Dip
directions: Drain artichoke hearts and chop.
Mix all ingredients together.
Spread evenly in a 9 inch round glass pie dish.
Bake at 325°F for 35 minutes or until lightly brown and bubbly on top.
Let cool for 10 minutes.
Serve with your favorite crackers, tortilla chips, or cucumber slices for dipping.

name: Sour Cream Substitute
directions: Beat together thoroughly and refrigerate.

name: Cold Smoked Beef Dip
directions: Combine cream cheese and processed cheese in medium bowl; mix until well blended.
Chop beef in small pieces.
Stir beef and onion into cheese mixture.
Refridgerate 1 hour or overnight before serving.

similar.name: Easy Restaurant Style Rotel Cheese Dip

name: Baking Mix Aka "bisquick"
directions: Measure the dry ingredients into a bowl.
Sift together 3 times, place in a large bowl and cut shortening into dry ingredients using pastry blender until size of small peas.
Store in tightly covered container.

name: Missouri Mix
directions: Stir baking powder, dry milk, and salt into the flour.
Using an electric mixer, mix shortening into the flour mixture until all the particles of shortening are thouroughly coated and the mixture resembles coarse cornmeal.
Store in an airtight container in a cool dry place. No need to refrigerate.

name: Kittencal's 15 Minute Parmesan Pasta
directions: Place the cooked pasta in a bowl; keep warm (do not rinse pasta).
In a small skillet saute the garlic in olive oil until golden and tender (try not to burn the garlic) then pour the oil with the garlic over the cooked pasta.
Season with salt and lots of black pepper.
Add in the Parmesan cheese; toss to coat then serve immediately.
Delicious!

similar.name: Out of This World Caesar Pasta Salad

name: Pita Pizza
directions: Lay out pita bread on a cookie sheet.
Spread 3 Tbsp sauce onto each pita.
Sprinkle 1/8 tsp of oregano and basil onto each pita.
Top with desired toppings
Top with 1/4 cup of shredded mozzarella cheese and 1 Tbsp of parmesan cheese on each pita.
Add red pepper flakes if desired.
Broil in oven on second shelf position for about 4-5 minutes.

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip (Slow Cooker)
directions: Cube Cheese and add to Slow Cooker.
Chop Artichoke Hearts and Spinach and add to Cheese.
Place in a slow cooker on High setting.
Add Garlic and Pepper.
Heat until melted, stirring occasionally.
Takes about 1-2 hours.

name: Creamy Chile Con Queso
directions: Heat oil in pan.
Add onion and garlic and cook until onion is clear and stir in flour.
Gradually stir in evaporated milk and cook until mixture is thickened.
Stir in tomato, cheeses, and jalapenos.
Cook, stirring, about 5 minute or until cheeses are melted.

name: Grandma Bouclair's Dumplings (For Stew)
directions: Mix all ingredients together.
Turn stove to Medium.
Drop batter into the cooked stew, put on the.
lid for 15 minutes.
remove lid cook 10 minutes with no lid.
Now its ready to eat. Great warmed up too.

similar.name: Dumplings Steamed in a Pressure Cooker

name: Linda's Layered Pizza Dip
directions: In a bowl soften cream cheese in the microwave for 45 secs.
Layer all ingredients in a 9" pie plate in order listed, starting by spreading cream cheese evenly over bottom of the pie pan.
Bake in a preheated 350 oven, for 15 mins., or until dip is hot and cheese is melted.
Great with crackers, chips, pita chips, or bagel chips.

name: Awesome Potato Dip
directions: Mix all the ingredients together and chill or serve immediately.

name: Asian Rub
directions: Combine all ingredients.
With this one, I will often omit the salt and add just enough Soy Sauce to make it into a paste and rub it on the meat that way.

name: Cheddar Pepper Dip
directions: Slice green onions and dice green pepper.
Combine all ingredients.
Chill; serve with tortilla chips.

name: Berdie's Cheese Enchilada Casserole
directions: pre-heat oven to 350 degrees.
In a 2 1/2 quart banking dish layer tortillas, sauce and cheese until the dish is full.
Bake for 20 to 30 minutes uncovered.
Enjoy!

name: Savoury Tart
directions: Mix all the ingredients together in a bowl. Add the sweetcorn (or whatever filling you choose) and stir well.
Bake at 180°C for half an hour.
Simple? I think so.

name: Easy Restaurant Style Rotel Cheese Dip
directions: Place Rotel tomatoes (do not drain) in a microwave safe dish.
Microwave on high until scalding hot, about 3-5 minutes. (Time may vary depending on microwave.).
Cube Velveeta and place in a blender.
Add garlic powder, cumin and scalding hot rotel.
Blend until smooth and creamy.
Feel free to adjust spices & amounts to suit your taste, just don't forgo the method.
Serve with you favorite chips.
Refrigerate any leftovers.

name: The Best Chicken Quesadillas
directions: butter tortillas on one side only.
place one tortilla butter side down on a hot pan.
top with cheeses first (spread all the way to the edge).
next add tomatoes.
add onions on top of tomatoes.
add bacon.
finish with jalepenos and fresh cilantro.
The order of ingredients is important- if you don't add them in this order the filling in the quesadilla tends to fall out!
cook until golden brown and cheese is melted.

name: Out of This World Caesar Pasta Salad
directions: Cook pasta according to package directions.
Drain and rinse pasta under cold water until cold throughout. Toss pasta with
olive oil making sure to coat well. Believe it or not it prevents the pasta from
absorbing all of the dressing, thus becoming dry.
Add the rest of the ingredients and toss with dressing.
I like to garnish the top with more sliced green onions.
Add grilled chicken breast and this salad goes from a side dish to an entree.

name: Simple Simons Birthday Bones
directions: Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
In a bowl combine flour and baking powder.
In another bowl combine milk and peanut butter.
Mix wet and dry ingredients together. Mix well.
Turn out dough on a lightly floured surface and knead.
Roll out dough to 1/4 inch thick and cut into shapes.
Place on a greased baking sheet and bake for 20 minutes or until lightly brown.
Cool on a rack and store in an airtight container.

name: Spinach Artichoke Casserole
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees, spray 8 x 8 casserole dish with cooking spray.
Microwave spinach for 5 minutes, squeeze dry with paper towels.
Drain artichoke hearts and coarsely grind in food processor.
Combine all ingredients (except pepperjack cheese) in large bowl and stir until well blended.
Spread into bottom of casserole dish and sprinkle with Pepper Jack cheese.
Bake 30 minutes. Serve with tortilla chips.

name: English Muffin Cheese Whiz Snack Bread
directions: Slice English Muffins in half.
Toast Muffin halves in your toaster or toaster oven.
Butter toasted muffin halves.
Spread Cheese Wiz over buttered side of muffin, using enough to cover the top of the muffin completely.
Shake parmesean cheese over Cheeze Wiz, to personal taste.
Place muffins on a foil lined baking sheet and broil in your oven or toaster oven until bubbly and browned on top.
Allow muffins to cool for 1-2 minutes before serving with your favorite meal.

name: Kittencal's Garlic-Onion Dip
directions: In a bowl combine the sour cream with soft cream cheese until very well combined (this might take a few minutes in order to remove all the lumps).
Add in Worcestershire sauce, garlic, dry onion soup and shredded cheddar cheese; mix until well combined.
Add in Tabasco to taste.
Cover and chill for a minumum of 5 or 24 hours.
Remove from the fridge about 30 minutes to soften the dip.

name: Cheesy Pizza Dip
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Mix together cream cheese and Italian seasoning. Spread into a 9 inch glass pie plate.
In separate bowl, combine cheeses, sprinkle half over cream cheese mixture.
Spread salsa over the cheese mixture, then sprinkle rest of cheese on top.
Bake approximately 20 minutes or until bubbly. Serve with French bread or chips.

name: Creamy Chip or Veggie Dip
directions: Mix all ingredients well.
Cover and chill for at least 1 hour in the refrigerator before serving (if it lasts that long!).

similar.name: Easy Restaurant Style Rotel Cheese Dip

name: Terrific Tofu Pizza
directions: Place oven rack in top third of oven. Preheat to 500°F (260°C).  Line a rimmed baking sheet with foil.  Slice flock of tofu in half horizontally to form 2 thinner slices.  Then cut each piece in half.  Pat dry with paper towels.

Place tofu on foil-lined pan.  In a bowl stir salsa with olives, then spoon over tofu and spread to edges.  Sprinkle with half of cheddar, then feta.  Finish with remaining cheddar and oregano.  Place in oven  Turn oven to broil to cook until cheese melts, 6-8 minute Sprinkle with green onion.

name: Puff Pastry and Parmesan Cream Appetizers
directions: Heat oven to 400 deg F/ 200 deg Celsius.
Unroll the pastry on a lightly floured surface. If necessary, roll slightly thinner.
With a cookie cutter (use any shape you like) cut out shapes until you have used up all the pastry.
Brush the pastry  shapes with beaten egg, and sprinkle with black sesame seeds if using.
Transfer to a baking tin, and bake in the preheated oven until puffed and golden, about 5 - 7 minutes, depending on size: do keep a watch.
Whip the cream until stiff, then fold in the grated parmesan.
When the pastry shapes have cooled, pipe or spoon a little parmesan cream on each, and garnish to taste.

name: Ultra Easy Biscuits
directions: Pre-heat oven to 450 degrees F.
Blend dry ingredients together.
Mix in Oil and Milk until combined.
Knead lightly then pat into a circle approximately 8 inches diameter then cut into 6 wedges for larger biscuits or into a rectangle and cut into 12 squares.
You can use a biscuit cutter and cut rounds but I like the rustic look of them in squares or wedges.
Bake for 10 - 12 minutes.

similar.name: English Muffin Cheese Whiz Snack Bread

name: My Pesto
directions: just put everything in a little mini chopper, and whirl.
my trick is to add a bit of boiling water if it neeeds thinning---not more oil:).

name: Green Chile-Cilantro Pesto Sauce (Pasta)
directions: Puree cilantro, cheese, green chile, jalapeno, pine nuts, and garlic in food processor until smooth, scraping down sides as necessary.
With processor running, add oil in steady stream until emulsified. Season with salt and pepper.
Toss pesto with cooked pasta and reserved pasta cooking water, if necessary.

name: Spinach and Artichoke Dip (Light)
directions: Preheat oven to 350º.

Combine 1 1/2 cups mozzarella, sour cream, 2 tbs Parmesan and next ingredients (through spinach) in a large bowl, and stir until well blended. Spoon mixture into a 1/2 qt baking dish. Sprinkle with 1/2 c mozzarella and 2 tbs Parmesan. Bake for 30 minutes or until bubbly and golden brown. Serve with tortilla chips or veggies. Use as a spread with turkey or chicken sandwiches.

name: Gilroy Garlic Festival Wowchos
directions: Pre-heat oven to 375-degrees F.
Coat garlic cloves with oil and bake for 30 minutes or until soft and golden.
Cover a 9"X13" foil covered metal pan with tortilla chips.
Mash and distribute garlic, onion, chiles and olives evenly over the chips.
Cover with shredded cheese and bake at 400-degrees F for 5 minutes or until cheese melts.
Top with cilantro and green onions.

similar.name: The Blue Willow Inn's Vidalia Onion Dip

name: Swiss Cheese Appetizer
directions: Preheat oven to 350 degrees.
Mix first 4 ingredients.
pour into pie plate or similar small baking dish.
bake for 30 minutes.
sprinkle the bacon on top.
bake for additional 5 minutes.
serve with crackers or crusty bread.

similar.name: Puff Pastry and Parmesan Cream Appetizers

name: Easy Baked Ziti
directions: Preheat oven to 350.
Boil ziti, following the package directions.
Drain the ziti and place in a large bowl.
Mix all the ricotta cheese with the ziti.
Mix half of the mozzarella cheese with the ziti.
Spray a large pan (larger than 13x9) with cooking spray.
Cover the bottom half of the pan with half the pasta sauce.
Put the ziti mixture on top of the sauce.
Pour the remaining sauce on top of the ziti.
Top with the remaining mozzarella cheese.
Bake for 20-30 minutes or until cheese is melted and it is lightly golden.

name: Roquefort Sauce
directions: You will need just a knob of butter.  The cream must be Double (Heavy) cream or it will split when being cooked.
In a small saucepan melt the butter over a low heat and add the onion. Saute until soft but not coloured.
Turn the heat up and add the Brandy, stirring for a minute.
Turn the heat back down and add the Roquefort and stir with a wooden spoon when it starts to melt add the cream.
Don't let it boil or it will go too runny and may curdle.
Stir until heated through and serve immediately.

name: Fried Zucchini/Yellow Squash (Quick, Easy and Cheesy)
directions: Slice squash into 1/4 inch slices.
Melt butter in frying pan over medium heat and add squash.
Sprinkle with salt, pepper and onion powder to taste.
Flip with a spatula every few minutes until cooked through.
Sprinkle with parmesean cheese just before serving.  It will melt in about 1 minute.

name: Copycat Bisquick Mix
directions: Mix all ingredients well until crumbly.
Keep in a sealed container on shelf until ready to use.

name: Blue Cheese Garlic Dip
directions: In a blender, combine all ingredients except crackers and celery; cover and process until blended.
Refrigerate until chilled. Serve with crackers and celery, for dipping.

name: Broccoli Cheese Casserole
directions: In a large bowl combine all ingredients and stir until combined. Transfer to a casserole dish (sprayed with non stick spray), and cover. Bake  at 325 degrees for about 30 to 35 minutes until the bottom begins to brown and cheese is melty. Serve as a side dish.

name: Olive Garden Fettuccini Alfredo (Copycat
directions: Depending on how thick or thin of a sauce you like will depend on how much heavy cream you use add garlic to YOUR taste I love garlic so I use 2 heaping tablespoons.
Over medium heat in a saucepan melt 1 stick of butter and add the entire container of Parmesan cheese and begin to whisk.
Add garlic slowly.

Add heavy cream, again whisking until no longer lumpy.  At this temp it should come to a boil on its own.  When it does, slowly add more heavy cream until the consistency YOU desire, and then remove from heat.
Immediately pour over pasta and enjoy !

similar.name: Out of This World Caesar Pasta Salad

name: Cream Cheese and Almond Pinecone
directions: In a 350 degree oven toast the almonds in a single layer on a cookie sheet.

Meanwhile, combine the room temperature cheeses.  Mound the cheese mixture onto the serving platter and shape into a pinecone shape with a spreading knife.  Beginning at the bottom, pointed end of the pinecone begin placing the toasted almonds in rows, overlapping them slightly as you build the rows.  The almonds should have the tapered end pointing downward.  When it is done it will look like a huge pinecone.  Decorate with silk leaves or a bow.  Serve with an assortment of crackers and festive spreading knives.

similar.name: Puff Pastry and Parmesan Cream Appetizers

name: Easiest Snapper
directions: Preheat oven to 425°F.
Place the fish in a lightly buttered baking dish with skin side down.
Bake at 425°F for 12 to 15 minutes per inch of thickness.
Mix all the remaining ingredients together.
When fish is cooked through, spread mixture over the top.
Place under broiler until top is brown and bubbly. Serve.

similar.name: Fried Zucchini/Yellow Squash (Quick, Easy and Cheesy)

name: Spinach Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix all of the above well.
Bake at 375o about 45 minute (until hot & bubbly) in a large rectangle pan.
Serve with crackers, bread, etc.

name: Cheesy Spinach Dip
directions: Thaw the spinach in the microwave and squeeze to remove excess water.
Place the spinach in a large pot on the stove, medium high heat.
Add rest of the ingredients stirring to mix it all together.
Let the cheese get melted.
If the mixture is still liquidy then add flour one tablespoon at a time until it thickens.
Serve warm with tortilla chips or crusty bread.  Can be reheated easily in the microwave.

name: Bee's Bodacious Butter
directions: Mix all ingredients and allow flavors to mingle for 30 minutes or more.
Serve over grilled meats, vegetables or bread.  Enjoy!

similar.name: Fried Zucchini/Yellow Squash (Quick, Easy and Cheesy)

name: Spicy Artichoke Dip
directions: Mix ingredients together.
Bake in an uncovered 1 1/2-quart baking dish at 350 degrees for 20-30 minutes or until slightly browned.
Serve with crackers or cubed sourdough bread.

name: French Bread Pizza
directions: Preheat oven to 425' f.
Grate whole block of cheese. (additional cheese may be required).
Spread spaghetti sauce on bread.
Sprinkle cheese on top.
Bake pizza bread 10-15 minute or until cheese melts.
Cool 5 minute then cut. Enjoy!

name: Cheese Dip for Vegetables
directions: In a medium mixing bowl, combine all ingredients.
With electric mixer, mix well until all ingredients are combined.
Serve immediately or refrigerate until needed.
Serve with fresh vegetables for dipping.

similar.name: Easy Restaurant Style Rotel Cheese Dip

name: Dumplings to Die For
directions: Combine the flour and baking powder.
In seperate bowl (or measuring cup) combine the milk and oil.
Add wet ingredients to the dry ingredients.
Drop from tsp into broth.
Cover, simmer 10 minutes.

similar.name: Dumplings Steamed in a Pressure Cooker

name: Zesty Dip
directions: Blend cream cheese, chiles, and jam together until smooth, spread into a shallow serving dish.
sprinkle with cheese.
cover and refrigerate untill chilled.

name: Hattie Jo's Homemade Macaroni
directions: Melt butter in pan, mix flour, salt and pepper. Add to melted butter, pour in milk. Cook and stir until thick and bubbly. Add 1 ½C cheese until melted. Put ½ Mac in casserole dish. Pour ½ cheese sauce and repeat layers, top with remaining cheese. Bake uncovered at 350* for 30 minutes.

similar.name: Out of This World Caesar Pasta Salad

name: Grandma's Pancakes
directions: 1.   In a bowl, mix well or even sift  together flour,salt and sugar, baking
powder, .
2. after dry ingredients are mixed make a deep hole in the center, set aside.
3. take the milk, egg and melted butter and blend together.
4. Take the milk mixture and pour in the middle of the dry ingredients
make sure your batter is completely mixed together.
5. Heat a lite greased griddle ,medium heat. make sure your pan is hot.
BEFORE pouring the batter.
6. Ladle out the batter to the pan, depending on the size of cakes you
want to use a 1/4- 1/2c for each pancake.
7. top with your favorite topping and serve immediately.
8. ENJOY.

similar.name: English Muffin Cheese Whiz Snack Bread

name: Uncle Jim's Pesto
directions: In a blender or food processor, combine basil, cheese, garlic and salt.  Process on high until smooth; then slowly add olive oil until well blended.
Pesto may be used immediately or frozen in small batches for future use.

I have frozen in ice cube trays, or alternatively have used a cookie scoop to measure dollops onto waxed paper lined cookie sheets, quick frozen, then transferred the frozen dollops to a zippered freezer bag for storage.

name: Alfreado Sauce
directions: In a mixing bowl combine all ingredients and mix until smooth.
Then cook over medium heat and continually  stirring until smooth, and sauce consistancy
You may need to add more milk if you like thinner sauce.
Add your garlic to taste and serve!

name: Dumplings Steamed in a Pressure Cooker
directions: Sift flour,baking power and salt together. Combine the egg,milk and oil then add dry ingredients to make soft dough. Drop from teaspoon into the broth.There should be at least 3 cups of liquid.
Place cover on cooker WITHOUT indicator weight and steam 15 minutes.Serve at once.

name: Basil Pesto
directions: Place the Fresh basil, Pine Nuts and Fresh Garlic in a food processor and pulse until finely chopped.
Add the Olive Oil and Parmesan cheese and pulse a few more times until everything is mixed evenly.
Store in containers. can stay in refrigerator for a couple week. freezer for a couple of months.

name: Football Party "dip"
directions: Mix all together but the chips, refrigerate and let the flavors meld.  Add more dressing if mixture isn't sticking together enough.  Serve with chips and watch your guest's eyes widen, they won't leave the bowl!

name: Natural Spinach Dip
directions: Combine Mayo, Cream Cheese, and Sour Cream in mixer on low speed.
Mix in all seasonings.
Add Spinach and Carrot on low speed to combine.
Serve in bread bowl or with chips.

name: Cheese Wafers
directions: Preheat oven to 400°.
Mix flour and butter,.
then add cheese and seasonings.
Form into a roll (approximately 1 inch in diameter).
Wrap the roll in wax paper and chill at least several hours or overnight.
Slice into thin wafers,.
top each with a pecan half,.
and bake about 8 minutes.

similar.name: English Muffin Cheese Whiz Snack Bread
